claim_boundary: Phase 10 registration only. This does not claim production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, agreement detection, causal inference, prediction, alert readiness, autonomous action, or truth resolution.
phase10_goal: Detect repeated metadata structures across Phase 4 normalized records, Phase 5 candidate pairs, Phase 6 inspection records, Phase 7 review packets, and Phase 8 index artifacts without claiming truth, causality, contradiction, prediction, or alert readiness.
purpose: Run the first bounded analytical-core layer over existing worldwide artifacts: metadata-level pattern detection.
required_gates: Gate 1: load only bounded existing artifacts
Gate 3: preserve source provenance and packet IDs
Gate 4: keep outputs at candidate-pattern tier
Gate 5: separate observed counts from interpretation
Gate 7: no production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, causal inference, prediction, alert readiness, autonomous action, or truth resolution
